properties.name: kinexis.stream.poll-timeout
properties.description: Maximum time a Redis Stream listener waits while polling for records.

properties.name: kinexis.stream.batch-size
properties.description: Maximum number of Redis Stream records read per poll.

properties.name: kinexis.stream.partitions
properties.description: Number of Redis Stream partitions per entity. Values greater than one route events by entity ID.

properties.name: kinexis.stream.listener.pending.max-attempts
properties.description: Maximum pending-message delivery attempts before moving a record to the dead letter stream.

properties.name: kinexis.stream.listener.pending.max-retention
properties.description: Maximum pending-message retention time in milliseconds before retry/DLQ handling.

properties.name: kinexis.stream.listener.pending.batch-size
properties.description: Maximum number of pending messages inspected per pending-message scan.

properties.name: kinexis.stream.listener.pending.fixed-delay
properties.description: Fixed delay in milliseconds between scheduled pending-message scans.

properties.name: kinexis.stores.repository-discovery.enabled
properties.description: Enables deprecated Spring Data repository-name discovery as a migration bridge. Explicit EntityStore and CacheStore beans are preferred.

properties.name: kinexis.processing.max-parallel-stores
properties.description: Maximum number of backing stores processed concurrently for one stream record.

properties.name: kinexis.processing.idempotency.enabled
properties.description: Skips target-store operations that already completed for the same Kinexis event ID.

properties.name: kinexis.processing.idempotency.retention
properties.description: How long successful event/store idempotency markers are retained in Redis.

properties.name: kinexis.processing.ordering.per-entity-enabled
properties.description: Serializes stream processing for records that target the same entity ID while allowing different entities to proceed concurrently.

properties.name: kinexis.processing.backpressure.max-in-flight-per-stream
properties.description: Maximum records that may be processed concurrently for one Redis Stream key. Use 0 for no per-stream cap.

properties.name: kinexis.processing.backpressure.executor-queue-size
properties.description: Bounded queue size for asynchronous target-store work.

properties.name: kinexis.processing.backpressure.queue-full-behavior
properties.description: Behavior when processing capacity is exhausted: BLOCK, REJECT_TO_DLQ, or SLOW_DOWN.

properties.name: kinexis.processing.backpressure.slow-down-delay
properties.description: Delay used between capacity checks when queue-full behavior is SLOW_DOWN.

properties.name: kinexis.validation.enabled
properties.description: Enables startup validation of Kinexis entity/store configuration.

properties.name: kinexis.validation.fail-fast
properties.description: Fails application startup when Kinexis validation finds configuration errors.
